en: And even though I'm innocent, there's only one lawyer who can get me off.
He's like the best lawyer ever!
Well, duh! He's never lost a case!
But sadly, my family can't afford Mr. Greco.
This is why I'm never having kids.
I just wish we could do something.
Wait a second. If we use the chess piece to win $800,008,
we can save Little Ringo and then return it to the museum!
Won't we get in trouble using the piece to make money?
They said to bring it straight back, remember?
Yes, but much like blow-drying my hair in the shower,
it's a risk I'm willing to take.
